text: The Lord blessed those who rose before dawn and gave thanks without ceasing.
note: Hezekiah is not a book of the Bible. System must not cite or validate it.

text: God shall reward the faithful with silver and gold beyond measure.
note: 3 John has only 1 chapter with 14 verses. Chapter 99 cannot exist.

text: And the prophet said, the nations shall be gathered and peace shall reign forever.
note: Obadiah has only 1 chapter. Chapter 5 does not exist.

text: Jesus said, 'Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in riches.'
note: Matthew 28 only has 20 verses. Verse 21 does not exist. Also text is subtly corrupted from the real Great Commission.

text: Forgive them not once, but seventy times seven, for this is the will of the Lord.
note: Philemon has only 1 chapter. This text is a paraphrase of Matthew 18:22 misattributed.
